params.value: SELECT OwnerId, AccountId, ActivityDate FROM Event WHERE AccountId != null AND ActivityDate = LAST_WEEK AND OwnerId IN ('0059L000000JKG9QAO','005W7000000zmHSIAY','005W7000005SxezIAC','005W7000009NCmTIAW','0051v00000BjKXAAA3','0059L000000JKFlQAO','005W7000005SzP3IAK','005W7000005SxQTIA0','005W7000004vQt7IAE','005W7000005WNTFIA4','0059L000000IlsvQAC','0059L000000JKGDQA4','005W7000002HR5tIAG','005W70000048JRNIA2','005W7000003UovJIAS','0059L000000JKGOQA4','005W7000004vQptIAE') GROUP BY OwnerId, AccountId, ActivityDate LIMIT 2000
